properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v12 v9 v13 v14

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Take me to the king I don't have much to bring My heart is torn in pieces It's my offering Take me to the king

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Truth is I'm tired Options are few I'm trying to pray But where are you? I'm all churched out Hurt and abused I can't fake What's left to do?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Truth is I'm weak No strength to fight No tears to cry Even if I tried But still my soul Refuses to die One touch-will change-my life

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Take me to the king I don't have much to bring My heart's torn into pieces It's my offering

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Lay me at the throne Leave me there alone To gaze upon your glory And sing to you this song Please take me to the king

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Truth is it's time To stop playing these games We need a word For the people's pain

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: So Lord speak right now Let it pour like rain Oh, yeah, we're desperate We're chasing after you

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: No rules, no religion I've made my decision To run to you The healer that I need

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Take me to the king I don't have much to bring My heart's torn to pieces It's my offering

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Lay me at the throne Leave me there alone To gaze upon your glory And to sing to you this song

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: Lord we're in the way We keep making mistakes The glory's not for us It's all for You

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: Lay me at the throne Leave me there alone To gaze upon your glory And sing to you this song

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: Take me to the king Take me to the king Take me to the king
